allow: Bash(node -e "require\('./controllers/authController'\); require\('./utils/validationSchemas'\); require\('./middleware/rateLimit'\); require\('./routes/authRoutes'\); require\('./docs/swaggerDefinition'\); console.log\('OK'\)")

Bash(node -e "require\('./controllers/authController'\); require\('./utils/validationSchemas'\); require\('./services/tokenService'\); require\('./routes/authRoutes'\); require\('./docs/swaggerDefinition'\); console.log\('OK'\)")

Bash(node -e "process.env.JWT_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH='./keys/private.pem'; process.env.JWT_PUBLIC_KEY_PATH='./keys/public.pem'; const ts = require\('./services/tokenService'\); const token = ts.generateAccessToken\({userId:'test',email:'t@t.com',role:'reporter'}\); const decoded = ts.verifyAccessToken\(token\); console.log\('Algorithm check passed'\); console.log\('sub:', decoded.sub, 'role:', decoded.role\);")

Bash(node -e "const ts = require\('./services/tokenService'\); const token = ts.generateAccessToken\({userId:'test',email:'t@t.com',role:'reporter'}\); const decoded = ts.verifyAccessToken\(token\); console.log\('jti:', decoded.jti, '| has jti:', !!decoded.jti\);")

Bash(node -e "const ts = require\('./services/tokenService'\); \(async\(\)=>{ const t = await ts.generateRefreshToken\('usr_test','dev_abc'\); const d = require\('jsonwebtoken'\).decode\(t\); console.log\('device_id:', d.device_id, '| sub:', d.sub, '| jti:', !!d.jti\); }\)\(\).catch\(console.error\)")

Bash(node -e "const jwt = require\('jsonwebtoken'\); const token = jwt.sign\({ sub:'usr_test', jti:'abc', type:'refresh', device_id:'dev_123' }, 'secret', { expiresIn: 100 }\); const d = jwt.decode\(token\); console.log\('device_id:', d.device_id, '| sub:', d.sub\);")
